alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
cleavage agent: Trypsin was added at a 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio
collision energy: using a normalized collision-energy setting of 30
enrichment method: immuno-affinity enrichment and MS-based proteomics approaches
instrument: using a Q Exactive Plus system
labeling: peptides were subjected to nanoelectrospray ionization, followed by MS/MS analysis
